message:
feat(deps): upgrade frankensqlite to rev 1f1542b for schema-only connections

Updates frankensqlite from rev 53c7e51 to 1f1542b, which includes:

- Connection::open_schema_only() — opens databases without loading all
  row data into MemDatabase. For cass's 22GB index database with 3.1M
  messages, this eliminates the minutes-long startup delay that was
  caused by reading every row into memory on connection open.

- open_with_flags(SQLITE_OPEN_READ_ONLY) now routes to open_schema_only
  automatically, so FrankenStorage::open_readonly() benefits immediately.

- Pager-backed B-tree cursors handle queries directly from disk pages
  in schema-only mode, so SELECT queries work without MemDatabase.

Also fixes the asupersync dependency in frankensqlite's workspace
Cargo.toml (path dep → git dep) so downstream git consumers can
resolve it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
